creator: kris@FreeBSD.org
text:
edwin@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: bsd.port.mk - A lot of ports are extracted with 0777 permissions.
> 
> Responsible-Changed-From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->portmgr
> Responsible-Changed-By: edwin
> Responsible-Changed-When: Fri Dec 28 02:13:30 UTC 2007
> Responsible-Changed-Why: 
> bsd.port.mk is portmgr territory (via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool)
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=119073

These are harmless when your WRKDIR has appropriate permissions.  You 
can set WRKDIRPREFIX to somewhere that you have created with go-rwx 
permissions to avoid this class of problem.

Kris
